somalign 0.99.1
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Quick start
    • Advanced workflow: existing SOMs
    • Anchor-regularized alignment
    • Two-pass global and local alignment
    • Algorithm and interpretation
    • API smoke test
    • Releases
    • Version 0.1.0
    • Changelog

Package index

Building reference and query objects

somalign_train_reference()
Train a reference SOM and build a somalign reference
somalign_reference()
Build a reference object from an existing SOM and old data
somalign_reference_from_nodes()
Build a reference object from saved node-level artifacts
somalign_reference_from_som()
Build a reference object directly from a trained kohonen SOM
somalign_query()
Prepare query data and attach or train a query SOM
somalign_query_from_som()
Build a query object from a pre-trained kohonen SOM

Preprocessing

somalign_normalize()
Global pre-correction of query data to match the reference distribution
somalign_quantile_normalize()
Divide each feature column by its upper quantile

Fitting

somalign_fit()
Align a query SOM to a reference SOM
somalign_fit_anchored()
Align a query SOM to a reference SOM using anchor sample pairs
somalign_fit_two_pass()
Two-pass alignment decomposing correction into global and local components

Results

somalign_results()
Return per-sample somalign results

Diagnostics and sensitivity

somalign_diagnostics()
Extract somalign diagnostics
somalign_sensitivity_grid()
Run an OT sensitivity grid
somalign_som_stability()
Assess alignment stability across query SOM random seeds
somalign_worst_nodes()
Return worst-projecting query SOM nodes
somalign_check_codebook_alignment()
Check query-reference codebook alignment before cell-level computation

Plots

somalign_plot_codebook_range()
Plot query vs reference SOM code ranges per marker
somalign_plot_correction()
Plot per-node correction norms
somalign_plot_label_confusion()
Plot label transfer confusion heatmap
somalign_plot_marker_distributions()
Plot per-marker cell distributions before projection
somalign_plot_mass_balance()
Plot node mass balance
somalign_plot_match_fraction()
Plot per-node match fraction
somalign_plot_outside_fraction()
Plot fraction of cells outside reference thresholds

Print methods

print(<somalign_anchored_fit>)
Print a somalign_anchored_fit object
print(<somalign_fit>)
Print a somalign_fit object
print(<somalign_query>)
Print a somalign_query object
print(<somalign_reference>)
Print a somalign_reference object

On this page

Developed by Mikhael Manurung.
